name: post_comment
description: Post a generated reply comment to a third-party post. Always pass dryRun=true the first time; switch to false only after the caller has reviewed the comment text and riskLevel.

postId.description: Internal id of the source post being replied to.

dryRun.description: When true, the server records the intended post but does not publish. Use true for evals and first-pass review.
